text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1174.  
But if we apply modern time zone offsets for these locations:  
Europe/Paris = UTC+1 (standard time)  
Asia/Singapore = UTC+8  

UTC offset difference: UTC+8 − UTC+1 = +7 hours.  
3:00 + 7 hours = 10:00 on the same date.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 10:00, February 15, 1174
